description: KYC envelope thresholds for permissioned vault deposit gating

max_age_days.description: Maximum allowed age (in days) of the most recent approved Persona inquiry before it is considered stale

allowed_countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes whose users may deposit. Inquiries with no resolved country are not blocked by this rule.

min_age_years.description: Minimum user age in years (computed from the inquiry birthdate). Inquiries with no birthdate are not blocked by this rule.

require_selfie.description: Whether to require a passing selfie verification on the inquiry

require_watchlist_pass.description: Whether to require a passing watchlist (sanctions/PEP) verification on the inquiry
